title: SQLancer calc.date undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 DATETIME, c2 INT, c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 1, 0.5), (NOW(), 2, 1.5);
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 DATETIME NOT NULL, c5 VARCHAR(50));
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(c2, DAY(t1.c1))) FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.c1 = t2.c4;
key_bug_features: SUM with COALESCE on undefined TIMESTAMP column
